string.text: Hey, are you by any chance interested in mobile phones?

Of course, sometimes they contain more useful information than a regular PDA. I won't be able to pay you much if they're broken, but I'll still buy them from you—no questions asked—and for a better price than the local bartender would offer.
Hi. I heard you buy old phones. I found a few, here you go...
Nice, here's your reward. Bring me more whenever you find them.
Hello, Professor! I came across this equipment, which I suspect was stolen from fallen field researchers. Would you be interested in buying it back?
Of course, stalker! Thank you for finding it—this kind of gear is hard to replace. Please, if you find more, bring it all to us.
